flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 32% at Rogers State University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.6k vs 3.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rogers State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Rogers State University rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 (54.9% → 69.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rogers State University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (25.1% → 29.0%).
